title: Frelka
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Frelka.png]] |name=Frelka |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Frelka|Tansarii Point Station}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It's a long story. The Aphotic hurt Frelka. I'm surprised he didn't say anything. I guess he doesn't want others meddling in his affairs.|[[E-5KL]], to a spacer|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Frelka's Folly|Station Gamma!}}}} '''Frelka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Scout/Legends|explorer]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Don't get interested, kid. You shouldn't go there. Bah! I guess I'll tell you anyway. Station Gamma was a research facility. Now it's run by an Overlord and his cronies. I went there to get treasure.|Frelka, to a spacer|}} Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Frelka visited the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]] along with his [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[E-5KL]]. They resided in [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that they used as a starting point to explore [[Station Gamma]], an [[asteroid base]] nearby. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Frelka and E-5KL flew out to Station Gamma to get treasure but they realized that the station had been taken oven by the [[Rak'qua]], a tribe of aggressive [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolans]]. While exploring, Frelka ran into a member of the [[Rak'qua]], the pair fought and Frelka lost causing him to flee the station back to Tansarii, in his haste leaving behind E-5KL. Once back on Tansarii he headed to the cantina to sulk over his defeat. Frelka later met a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] here who he asked to head back to Station Gamma and find his droid for him.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|To Station Gamma!|Tansarii Point Station}} The spacer then traveled to Station Gamma where E-5KL told him of Frelka's defeat and asked that the spacer kill the Rak'qua Aphotic who humiliated Frelka. The spacer did so and returned to Frelka to inform him of his foe's death and the safety of his droid. Frelka begrudgingly thanked the spacer despite wanting to have kept his defeat a secret. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Frelka got hurt treasure hunting?''"
"''He is an angry fellow, right now.|A spacer and [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra's]] [[Inaldra's Lieutenant|Lieutenant]]|{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Speak to Inaldra's Lieutenant to Get Work|Tansarii Point Station}}}} Frelka was unfriendly and rude after his defeat at the hands of the Rak'qua however this may not of reflected his normal personality. He was also extremely ungrateful to his droid, who he claimed he might scrap, showing he thought of it as a possession not a sentient being. Frelka was presumably also rather inexperienced in combat as the Rak'qua who defeated him was easily slain by an almost untrained spacer. ==Behind the scenes== Frelka was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} Frelka was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}} He gave the player a single optional side quest. ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesNGE}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?page=Mystery%20on%20Gamma%20Station&resource=features|text=Mystery on Gamma Station}} *{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=60008|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Tutorial}} *{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/guides.vm?id=60008|text=Getting Started}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Frelka's Folly}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Rodians]] [[Category:Scouts]]
